diagrams.title: Basic Network Security Model
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing secure message transmission from sender to receiver with an adversary attempting interception
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the components and flow of secure communication, understanding how encryption protects messages in transit

diagrams.title: CIA Triad Relationships
diagrams.description: Three interconnected circles showing Confidentiality, Integrity, and Availability as equally important components
diagrams.purpose: Understand that all three security goals are interdependent - weakening any one compromises overall security

diagrams.title: Classification of Security Attacks
diagrams.description: Tree diagram showing classification of attacks into passive and active categories
elements: Branch 1: Passive Attacks (Release of Message Content, Traffic Analysis)
Branch 2: Active Attacks (Masquerade, Replay, Modification of Messages, Denial of Service)
Leaf nodes: Descriptions of each attack type
diagrams.purpose: Categorize and understand different types of security threats for appropriate countermeasures
